zh.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Chalfunte是John de Chalfunte的兒子，於大約1300年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。他於1333年與Maude Garound在英國英格蘭肯特格盧布利其結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1370年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Chalfunte是John de Chalfunte的儿子，于大约1300年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾阿梅沙安。他于1333年与Maude Garound在英国英格兰肯特格盧布利其结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1370年在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾享年71岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: de

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Chalfunte was born about 1300, in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England as the son of John de Chalfunte. He married Maude Garound in 1333, in Groombridge, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1370, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Chalfunte est né environ 1300, à Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, fils de John de Chalfunte. Il a épousé Maude Garound en 1333, à Groombridge, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1370, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Chalfunte wurde um 1300 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, als Sohn von John de Chalfunte geboren. Er hat 1333 in Groombridge, Kent, England, United Kingdom Maude Garound geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1370 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Chalfunte è nato il circa 1300 nel Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England come figlio di John de Chalfunte. Lui sposato Maude Garound nel 1333, nel Groombridge, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1370, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Chalfunteは約1300年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイメルシャムでJohn de Chalfunteの息子として生まれた。1333年にイギリスイギリスケントグルーンブリッジでMaude Garoundと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1370年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Chalfunte(은)는 대략 1300년 영국 벅잉함실르 어머샤에서 John de Chalfunte의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1333년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 그룸브리지에서 Maude Garound(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Groombridge, Speldhurst, Kent, England,: Groombridge, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Chalfunte nasceu aproximadamente 1300, em Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra filho de John de Chalfunte. Ele casou-se com Maude Garound em 1333, em Groombridge, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1370, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Chalfunte родился около 1300 г. в местности амиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия. Его отца звали John de Chalfunte. Он женился на женщине по имени Maude Garound в 1333 г. в местности грумбридж, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1370 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Chalfunte nació aproximadamente 1300, en Amersham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra como hijo de John de Chalfunte. Se casó con Maude Garound en 1333, en Groombridge, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1370, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
